resolver_policy: resolve only reviewed public-safe source notes for the current drafting task
representation_contract: summary is usable for drafting but not direct quotation or support-state promotion
adequacy_requirement: drafting adequacy only; no support-state promotion
consumer_policy: chapter drafting and audit only; not claim promotion
support_boundary: drafting support only; not a source-derived promotion boundary
replay_boundary: fixture names a source note and audit report only; no resolver trace exists
residuals: fixture does not run a resolver
non_claims: fixture does not prove resolver behavior
fixture does not prove adequacy classification
